description: Release readiness validation — version sync, lockfile, manifests, security audit

items.text: All version-bearing files contain the same version number
items.reason: Version drift between files causes install failures and confusion

items.text: Version follows semver — breaking changes bump major, features bump minor
items.reason: Incorrect semver breaks dependency resolution for consumers

items.text: CHANGELOG updated with release notes for new version
items.reason: Users need to know what changed before upgrading

items.text: Lockfile is in sync with dependency declarations (no frozen-lockfile failures)
items.reason: Lockfile drift causes CI failures and non-reproducible builds

items.text: No new high/critical vulnerabilities in dependency audit
items.reason: Shipping known vulnerabilities exposes users to security risks

items.text: Plugin manifest version matches package version
items.reason: Version mismatch causes marketplace listing to show wrong version
Invalid manifest fields can break plugin installation

items.text: All CI checks pass (lint, typecheck, test, build)
items.reason: Shipping with failing CI means shipping broken code
Coverage regression indicates untested new code
